description: Create a fisheries patrol training exercise in Bridge Command's Solent environment. Establish a scenario directory at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/p) Solent Fisheries Patrol/' containing environment, ownship, and othership INI files. Configure the environment for 'Solent' with a start time of 06.00 in October (Month 10), visibility of 8.0, and weather at 3.0. The ownship 'PV Sentinel' must be positioned south of the Isle of Wight (~50.62, -1.15) on a heading of 045 at 12 knots. The scenario must include six vessels in 'othership.ini' (FV Horizon, FV Neptune's Pride, FV Silver Spray, MV Channel Express, FV Morning Star, and SY Artemis) with their designated types, coordinates, speeds, and at least two waypoint legs each. Configure the system radar settings (bc5.ini) with arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, radar_range_resolution=256, max_radar_range=72, and radar_angular_resolution=720. Produce a patrol briefing document at '/home/ga/Documents/fisheries_patrol_briefing.txt' listing the patrol vessel, all target vessels with their types, and enforcement priorities such as license and gear checks.
